revision.text:
[[ja:穴石神社 (伊賀市)]] {{Expand Japanese|穴石神社 (伊賀市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Anaishi Shrine | native_name = 穴石神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Anaishi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.842384|136.155014}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Konohanasakuya-hime|lt=Konohananosakuya-bime|az|Konohanasakuya|ca|Konohana no Sakuya hime|de|Konohanasakuyahime|en|Konohanasakuya-hime|fa|کونوهاناساکویا-هیمه|fr|Konohana-no-Sakuya|ja|コノハナノサクヤビメ|ko|고노하나노사쿠야비메|mni|ꯀꯣꯅꯣꯍꯅꯁꯀꯨꯌ-ꯍꯤꯃꯦ|pl|Konohanasakuya-hime|ru|Коноханасакуя-химэ|sv|Konohanasakuyahime|th|เซ็นเง็ง|vi|Konohana Sakuya Hime|zh|木花開耶姬|qid=Q1781862|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} }} {{nihongo|'''Anaishi Shrine'''|穴石神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380647|ltq=Q11380647|qid=Q11380647|1=List of Shikinaisha in Iga Province}} ** Series ordinal: 7 ** P155: {{ill|Sasa Shrine|lt=Sasa Shrine|ja|佐々神社|qid=Q24871075|1=Sasa Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039235|ltq=Q135039235|qid=Q135039235|1=Makiyamano Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Iga, Mie|lt=Iga|ar|إغا (ميه)|azb|ایقا، میه|be|Іга (горад)|ceb|Iga-shi|ce|Ига (гӀала)|ckb|ئیگا (میێ)|cs|Iga (Mie)|de|Iga (Mie)|en|Iga, Mie|envoyage|Iga|eo|Iga|es|Iga (Mie)|et|Iga (linn)|fa|ایگا، میه|fi|Iga (Mie)|fr|Iga (Mie)|gl|Iga|hy|Իգա|id|Iga, Mie|it|Iga (Mie)|ja|伊賀市|javoyage|伊賀市|ko|이가시|mzn|ایگا، میه|nl|Iga (Mie)|pl|Iga (miasto)|pt|Iga (Mie)|ro|Iga|ru|Ига (город)|sh|Iga|sr|Ига|sv|Iga|szl|Iga (mjasto)|tg|Ига|th|อิงะ|tl|Iga, Mie|tr|Iga, Mie|tt|Ига (шәһәр)|uk|Іґа (Міє)|uz|Iga (Mie)|vi|Iga, Mie|war|Iga, Mie|zh_classical|伊賀市|zh_min_nan|Iga-chhī|zh_yue|伊賀|zh|伊賀市|qid=Q460820|1=Iga, Mie}} * {{ill|Q1047128|ltq=Q1047128|qid=Q1047128|1=Iga Province}} * {{ill|Ahai district|lt=Ahai district|ja|阿拝郡|zh|阿拜郡|qid=Q11657437|1=Ahai district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.842384|136.155014}} == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Konohanasakuya-hime|lt=Konohananosakuya-bime|az|Konohanasakuya|ca|Konohana no Sakuya hime|de|Konohanasakuyahime|en|Konohanasakuya-hime|fa|کونوهاناساکویا-هیمه|fr|Konohana-no-Sakuya|ja|コノハナノサクヤビメ|ko|고노하나노사쿠야비메|mni|ꯀꯣꯅꯣꯍꯅꯁꯀꯨꯌ-ꯍꯤꯃꯦ|pl|Konohanasakuya-hime|ru|Коноханасакуя-химэ|sv|Konohanasakuyahime|th|เซ็นเง็ง|vi|Konohana Sakuya Hime|zh|木花開耶姬|qid=Q1781862|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181089 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11504610|ltq=Q11504610|qid=Q11504610|1=Unranked}} * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6190005005994 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '三重県伊賀市石川2291番地', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:穴石神社 (伊賀市)]] {{wikidata link|Q24870597}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Anaishi Shrine |Image = {{Image wanted|cat=Iga City}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Iga City|Q460820|qid=Q460820|1=Iga, Mie}} Ishikawa 2291 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|qid=Q1781862|lt=Konohana Sakuya-hime|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}}
{{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2564508|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}}
and others |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Alternate names = |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=April 16|Q2519|qid=Q2519|1=April 16}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Mie|label=Anaishi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} [[File:Anaishi Shrine Hōkyōintō.jpg|Thumbnail|Stone Hōkyōintō pagoda of Anaishi Shrine]] '''Anaishi Shrine''' (あないしじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN|lt=listed shrine}} (minor shrine) located in Ishikawa, {{ill|lt=Iga City|Q460820|qid=Q460820|1=Iga, Mie}}, {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}. === Explanation === Anaishi Shrine, though a local shrine, was promoted in the first year of {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} (859) from having no rank to Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade, and was placed among the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=official shrines|1=UNKNOWN}}. This first year of Jōgan was the year when the mythological genealogies found in the {{ill|lt=Kiki|Q842308|qid=Q842308|1=Kiki (Shinto)}} were first applied by the {{ill|lt=Imperial Court (Japan)|Q30253177|qid=Q30253177|lt=Imperial Court|1=Imperial Court of Japan}}, and 267 shrines nationwide were promoted. “Anaishi” is considered synonymous with “Anashi,” and as a phonetic transcription is said to be related to {{ill|lt=Anashi-ni-imasu Hyozu Shrine|Q11597229|qid=Q11597229|1=Anashi-Nimasu Hyōzu Shrine}}. Various theories have been proposed regarding the enshrined deities of Anaishi Shrine, but according to shrine records they are {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|qid=Q1781862|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|qid=Q2564508}}. Another theory interprets the Anashi deity as a {{ill|lt=wind god|Q1483957|qid=Q1483957|1=Fūjin}}, with the meaning of “Anashi” representing the “northwest wind.” === Treasures === A pair of {{ill|lt=wooden|Q11519384|qid=Q11519384|1=wooden}} {{ill|lt=A-un|Q4647014|qid=Q4647014|1=A-un}} {{ill|lt=komainu|Q20155846|qid=Q20155846|1=Komainu}} (guardian lion-dogs) (height: 54 centimeters) still exist, bearing the following ink inscription: {{Quotation|Dedicated and carved komainu. Iga Province, Abe District, Ishikawa, Amatsu Shrine Daimyōjin. Before the honored deity, principal supplicant Kawai Gozaburō no Jō, Fujiwara no Sueko Shigetane, likewise Inui Magosaburō (northwest), together with over eighty parishioners. Purpose: complete fulfillment of blessings. Genna 6 (Kōshin), twelfth month, an auspicious day. Made by Ōbe Shi (Great Buddha sculptor) of Sōraku-ji in Gōshū.|Kawai Shigetane, Inui Magosaburō|From the ink inscription on the komainu}} :This is an excellent early {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo-period|1=Edo period}} work jointly dedicated by residents of {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kawai-gō|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kawai Shigetane|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inui Magosaburō|1=UNKNOWN}}, and over 80 parishioners. :Together with the stone Hōkyōintō pagoda, it is designated as a {{ill|lt=Iga City|Q460820|qid=Q460820|1=Iga, Mie}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=designated cultural property|1=UNKNOWN}} (sculpture). === References === * “The History of Our Old Village, Ayama Town” (1980) * “Cultural Properties of Iga City” (2015) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Anashi-ni-imasu Hyozu Shrine|Q11597229|qid=Q11597229|1=Anashi-Nimasu Hyōzu Shrine}} ({{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sakurai City|Q127026|qid=Q127026|1=Sakurai, Nara}}) * {{ill|lt=Atago Shrine (Iga City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Atago Shrine}} {{Shinto sidebar}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Anaishi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Anaishi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Anaishi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Iga Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊賀市の建築物]] [[Category:伊賀市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Iga Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Mie Prefecture]] [[Category:伊賀市の画像提供依頼]]
